name: Bank Of Prairie Village
description_short: Bank of Prairie Village is a community bank offering checking, savings, and digital banking services with mobile wallet and online account management features.
description_long: Bank of Prairie Village is a Kansas-based community bank located in Prairie Village with NMLS# 401940 and routing number 101015046. The bank serves customers seeking traditional banking services with a local presence and digital accessibility. The institution offers checking and savings accounts accessible through online banking platforms, mobile wallet functionality, and ATM services. Customers can manage accounts, make transfers, pay bills, and set transaction alerts through their online banking system, which includes secondary user management and customizable security preferences. Bank of Prairie Village distinguishes itself through recent product updates, including the introduction of mobile wallet technology and improvements to funds availability policies as of July 1, 2025, demonstrating ongoing platform modernization. The bank provides ATM services with features including account transfers, multi-denomination withdrawals, immediate credit on cash deposits, and expedited check deposit processing ($300 immediate credit). The institution has invested in customer education through comprehensive online banking demo videos covering login procedures, security features, account navigation, and transfer functionality. Bank of Prairie Village appears to be a smaller regional bank focused on serving the Kansas market with personalized service and community banking values. The website provides limited information about loan products, investment services, or credit offerings, suggesting a focus on core deposit and payment services rather than comprehensive financial products.
services: Online banking account access and management
Check deposits with immediate partial credit
Transaction history and account balance viewing
pros: Mobile wallet technology now available for digital payments
Increased funds availability on check deposits as of July 2025 ($275 for standard checks, $6,725 for new account deposits)
ATM network with immediate credit on cash deposits and $300 instant credit on check deposits
Comprehensive online banking system with secondary user management and customizable security preferences
Educational demo videos for all major online banking features including transfers, security, and account navigation
Local community bank presence in Prairie Village, Kansas with direct phone support (913-713-0300)
Account transfer and payment management capabilities available through online and mobile platforms
cons: Website provides minimal information about loan products, interest rates, or fees
Limited details on deposit account types, minimum balances, or APY rates
No information about credit card, mortgage, or business lending services despite being a full-service bank
Geographic limitation as a Kansas-based regional bank may limit accessibility for out-of-state customers
Website lacks transparency on ATM surcharge policies or network partnerships
best_for: Kansas residents seeking local community bank services with digital accessibility
Customers wanting immediate check deposit processing and enhanced funds availability
Users interested in mobile wallet integration with traditional banking services
diagnosis: Bank of Prairie Village is best for Kansas-based customers seeking convenient digital banking with local community bank service. The main caveat is that the website provides extremely limited information about product details, fees, rates, or the full range of services offered, making it difficult to assess competitive positioning or suitability compared to other banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
